div.p: Let it be known to all people, both present and to come, that I, Brother Alan, prior of the Brethren of the Hospital of Jerusalem in England, with the advice and agreement of the brethren of our chapter, have granted, and by the present charter made firm, to the canons of Holyrood in Edinburgh, our lands that we have in Galloway, that is, Artun and Hirtun, with their correct bounds, and with all that belongs to the afroesaid lands, for them to have and to hold of our house in perpetuity, free and quit from all service and custom pertaining to us from there, that is, the same liberty and dignity as Roland donated them to us and confirmed, by rendering forty shillings each year to our house at two terms, that is, half at Laetare Ierusalem [the third Sunday of Advent], and half at the Assumption of Blessed Mary [15 August]. With these witnesses, Brother William, Brother Robert of Lindsay, Brother Robert Park, chaplains; Brother Gilbert de Vere, Brother Robert son of Richard, Brother Robert Pi..., Brother Simon of Scotia, by whom this charter was produced, Brother Samson, Simon the clerk, at the chapterhouse of St Michael, in the year of the Incarnation, 1192.
